race.comment: SH'BOURNE MIDNIGHT (6) turned in a top run fresh this course and distance. Has two wins when second-up and has plenty of upside with the run under his belt. Ready to find best form. ZEWINNA (9) saluted at this track two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when fifth in the same race as SH'BOURNE MIDNIGHT after doing her best work late. Well weighted and looks a leading player. STONE COLD STUNNER (8) returns after a spell of four months. Started the last campaign in good style when in the placings over 1200m at Launceston. Comes here with definite claims. ALVARINHO (3) was well below best fresh but strips fitter and can improve sharply. THESPIAN WATERS (5) was well off best last time. Can sneak into the finish.
